what is my gross salary

• From your Form 16: Gross salary = ₹12,00,000
• These numbers are already in your draft — use Review to confirm before filing
How to fix AIS mismatch?

• Mismatch means Form 16, AIS, or 26AS show different numbers
• Fix before filing — ITD auto-matches TDS and income
• Ask employer to correct TDS if Form 16 is wrong
• Or file matching AIS to avoid a notice

For your return:
• Your draft suggests ITR-1
• Fix AIS/Form 16 mismatches on Review before paying
